# affiliate.dmm.com — Offline Mirror

Offline snapshot of the [DMM Affiliate API v3 documentation](https://affiliate.dmm.com/api/).

## Contents

| Path | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `api/guide/index.html` | Getting started guide |
| `api/index.html` | API overview |
| `api/credit.html` | Credit / attribution page |
| `api/v3/floorlist.html` | Floor List endpoint |
| `api/v3/itemlist.html` | Item List endpoint |
| `api/v3/actresssearch.html` | Actress Search endpoint |
| `api/v3/genresearch.html` | Genre Search endpoint |
| `api/v3/makersearch.html` | Maker Search endpoint |
| `api/v3/seriessearch.html` | Series Search endpoint |
| `api/v3/authorsearch.html` | Author Search endpoint |
| `api/v3/affiliatesdk.html` | Affiliate SDK reference |
| `css/affili.dmm.com.css` | Site stylesheet |
| `css/common_base.css` | Common base stylesheet |

## Notes

- These files are saved for offline reference and archival purposes.
- The live documentation may have been updated since this snapshot was taken.
- Some IDs documented as `integer` are actually returned as strings by the API (e.g. `floor_id`, `genre_id`, `actress id`). See `docs/api-coverage.md` for verified field types.
